title: Spicy Pappardelle Carbonara
description: A spicy twist on the classic Italian pasta dish. Delicate yet bold flavors come together in this unique recipe.

ingredients.name: Mustardy Ethiopian Spices
ingredients.notes: Available in most specialty stores or online

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle according to package instructions until al dente.
In a saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until tender.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the mustardy Ethiopian spices and cook for 1 minute.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, Parmesan cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the cooked pasta to the bowl and toss with the egg mixture.
Add the cooked mushroom mixture to the pasta and toss until well combined.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional Parmesan cheese if desired.
